name: Pineapple Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into chunks and boil until done, or cook in the microwave oven.
2. Cut the onion, pepper, and carrots into wedges.
3. Drop the vegetable wedges into a small saucepan of boiling water and cook for 5 minutes. Drain well.
4. In a small saucepan, mix together cornstarch, chicken stock, vinegar, brown sugar, soy sauce, and sherry. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly, and simmer for 2 or 3 minutes.
5. Add the vegetables, chicken, and pineapple to the sauce. Reheat until heated through.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve very hot over rice or chow mein noodles.
